extension.summary: Access your content from Easynews and Debrid Clouds.
extension.description: Forge is a streamlined Kodi video addon for browsing and playing content from Easynews and your debrid services. Built around a modern, maintainable codebase with custom Discover, Search, and Lists windows. Intended for advanced Kodi users. You must own the content of any media you play through this addon.
extension.disclaimer: The author of this addon does not host any of the content which is found and has no affiliation with any of the content providers.
extension.news: INFO: For latest changes see Changelog within Tools of add-on.
